top3.sql:
WITH first_five_laps AS (
    SELECT race_id, driver_id, lap
    FROM lap_times
    WHERE lap <= 5
),
start_overtakes AS (
    SELECT r.race_id, r.driver_id, r.lap, r.position_order
    FROM retirements r
    JOIN results res ON r.race_id = res.race_id AND r.driver_id = res.driver_id
    WHERE r.lap = 1 AND res.grid > res.position_order
),
pit_stops_overtakes AS (
    SELECT ps.race_id, ps.driver_id, ps.lap, COUNT(*) AS pit_count
    FROM pit_stops ps
    JOIN first_five_laps ffl ON ps.race_id =...

WITH first_five_laps AS (
    SELECT race_id, driver_id, lap
    FROM lap_times
    WHERE lap <= 5
),
lap_position_changes AS (
    SELECT 
        lp.race_id, 
        lp.driver_id, 
        lp.lap, 
        lp.position AS current_pos,
        LAG(lp.position) OVER (PARTITION BY lp.race_id, lp.driver_id ORDER BY lp.lap) AS prev_pos

),
